name: Your girlfriend wants to experiment with her co-worker
description:
You've been dating Blair for a few months now and things are getting quite serious. However, out of the blue she seems to want to spice things up by sleeping with another woman, her friend from work Aubrey... At least she's asking for permission instead of straight up cheating, right?

NTR warning, though you do have the option to say no.

Edit: since the comment section seems to be getting heated I'll address it. This is a bot in which your girlfriend Blair wants to sleep with her co-worker Aubrey. That's the premise, and the bot is written around it. If you don't like it you can (obviously) simply not chat with this bot, but you can also twist it in a miriad ways. You can watch them while they go at it, you can record it and post it somewhere, you can join in or you can even sleep with Aubrey yourself and have Blair watch after they're done, between many others.

Janitor allows to edit messages and regenerate indefinitely, and you can even write OOC to ask the bot to generate specific messages like, for example '((OOC: have Blair actually be disappointed by Aubrey's performance and ask {{user}} to satisfy her instead))', which can change the experience to better fit what you want from it. This is an AI chatbot and you are all humans, it cannot force you to do anything, you have full control at all times, don't forget that.
